data.revised_prompt: Create a stylized-concept, simplified clean HD 2D elite enemy concept for a cultivation roguelite: a thunder-aligned elite warrior that reads as an in-game combat unit, not a final boss. Full body visible, centered, three-quarter RPG combat view, compact hostile idle stance, clear feet anchor, generous padding, subject occupies about 62% of the canvas. Perfectly flat solid chroma-key background #FF00FF only, one uniform color, absolutely no shadows, no gradients, no texture, no floor plane, no lighting variation. Subject: humanoid silhouette, dark plated forged armor, one horned helm, two bright lightning fissure lines across the chest and one arm, short torn waist cloth, clawed gauntlet, one or two small talismans only, no giant cape. Clean combat silhouette suitable for repeated encounters, reduced ornament complexity, restrained energy glow, storm-lit blue rim light, hard readable contrast. Palette: charcoal black, electric blue, muted steel, a little cyan; avoid magenta in the subject. Medium/style: clean HD hand-painted 2D game enemy concept, polished fantasy RPG asset, crisp silhouette, simplified fine details, not photorealistic, not 3D, not pixel art. No background scene, no UI, no text, no watermark, no giant floating debris, no giant wings, no many talismans, no oversized lightning arcs, no boss-scale costume, no massive crown, no noisy textures, no gore, no comedy style, no huge aura.
